ItacAcademyItem.Name: Desiosi-Bologna (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication related to the history of the Academy, but not in British Library collections, is: Accademia dei Desiosi, Academiae leges (1651?), ed. Ovidio Montalbani. (Academy`s emblem and motto on the title page)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
